title: Buttermilk Bread
description: A simple recipe for homemade buttermilk bread with a crispy crust and a soft interior.
instructions: Cut the crisp bread into 1-inch cubes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the buttermilk, melted buttery, and 2 tablespoons of unsalted butter.
Add the cubed bread to the wet ingredients and stir until just combined.
Pour the mixture into the prepared loaf pan.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the interior is set.
Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
Transfer to a serving plate and serve warm.
